ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary agent of the author */,
  "author_bio_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's biography page */,
  "author_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the author */,
  "author_awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition number of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of book cover (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language the book is written in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the book */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book */,
  "book_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the book */,
  "book_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the book */,
  "book_price_history" TEXT /* Price history of the book */,
  "book_retailer_links" TEXT /* Links to retailers where the book can be purchased */,
  "book_cover_image" TEXT /* URL of the book cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_description_short" TEXT /* Short description of the genre */,
  "genre_example_books" TEXT /* Example books for the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "publisher_website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "publisher_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the literary agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the agent */,
  "agent_website" TEXT /* Website of the agent */,
  "agent_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the agent */,
  "agent_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the book was sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "sale_region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  "sale_country" TEXT /* Country where the sale was made */,
  "sale_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the sale was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "store_website" TEXT /* Website of the store */,
  "store_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer */,
  "review_rating_breakdown" TEXT /* Breakdown of the rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_useful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  "review_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "edition_number" TEXT /* Number of the edition */,
  "edition_date" TEXT /* Date of the edition */,
  "edition_description" TEXT /* Description of the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_editions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "translation_language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "translation_date" TEXT /* Date of the translation */,
  "translator_name" TEXT /* Name of the translator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_translations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_events_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
